_description: Add an average reference line to a worksheet axis. The reference-line node goes inside a pane in the panes section.

reference_line_average._description: Average reference line on a quantitative axis. Place inside the pane node in panes.

reference_line_constant._description: Constant reference line at a fixed value

reference_line_parameter._description: Reference line using a parameter value

notes.placement: reference-line is a direct child of pane (inside panes section), NOT inside view
notes.scope: One pane corresponds to one measure; add reference-line to the correct pane for the target measure
